svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="衔接" id="flow1"> <mxGraphModel dx="-559" dy="-96" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="360" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="保障层与 AI 工作流的三个衔接时机" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="400" x="350" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="写之前：规则前置

Agent 启动加载规则文件
AI 还没动笔就知道红线
成本：零 (预防)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="290" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="写之中：实时校验

IDE hook 跑轻量检查
违规当场提示趁热纠正
成本：秒级 (低成本)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="290" x="390" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="提交前：全量门禁

契约闸 + 测试 + ArchUnit
任何一道红打回重改
成本：分钟级 (最可靠)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="290" x="740" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="t1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="t2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="t2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;" target="t3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="loop" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f1f5f9;strokeColor=#64748b;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;" value="事故 → 新规则 → 写进 ArchUnit/hook → 下次同类错误被拦 保障层是被事故喂出来的活体系" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="800" x="150" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="el" edge="1" parent="1" source="t3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="loop"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

提交前：全量门禁

任何一道红打回重改
成本：分钟级 (最可靠)
